intentSynonyms: look up question neighbors in hack2hire
fetch a single question neighbors in hack2hire
view one specific question neighbors in hack2hire
get prev/next questions in a list in hack2hire
description: Get the previous and next questions relative to a given post within a filtered, sorted list. Pass the same `company`, `type`, and `sortedBy` you would use in `list_questions` so the navigation matches the UI ordering. The previous or next field has empty values when the post is at the start or end of the list.

postId.description: Post ID to anchor navigation around.

company.description: Company key in uppercase (e.g. "PINTEREST"). Match the list_questions call you used.

sortedBy.description: Sort order. Defaults to "isLocked" — match the list_questions sortBy you used.
